projects.title: RePaw
projects.description: Django REST API and webapp about dogs — connecting dog owners with services, walkers, and pet stores. Features mobile-friendly interface and comprehensive API.

projects.title: Finance Accounts
projects.description: Personal finance tracker with transaction management, category analytics, and spending visualization dashboards built with Django.

projects.title: UR8 — YouTube Clone
projects.description: Full YouTube clone with video streaming, channels, user subscriptions, comment system, and admin panel. Built with FFmpeg for video processing.

projects.title: PixelSprint
projects.description: Task management application with sprint planning, Kanban boards, team collaboration, Celery async tasks, and comprehensive Pytest test suite.

projects.title: Speech Recognition 0-9
projects.description: Machine learning model that recognizes spoken digits 0-9 using audio feature extraction (MFCC) and neural networks via Keras/TensorFlow.

projects.title: Rustix Engine
projects.description: Game development engine written in Rust with WebAssembly support. Features a custom ECS architecture and WebGL renderer.

projects.title: Snake Game
projects.description: Classic Snake game built with Phaser and TypeScript. Navigate the grid, collect 49 skill orbs across 7 categories, and grow your snake. Features category-colored food items and progressive speed increase.

projects.title: Bio Explorer 2D
projects.description: Interactive 2D portfolio explorer built with Phaser.js. Explore an 1800x1400 overworld with 5 themed zones, talk to NPCs, collect 49 skills, and play 3 minigames — all in a retro pixel-art style.

projects.title: Bio Explorer 3D
projects.description: 3D portfolio explorer built with Three.js. Traverse a 1800x1400 3D overworld with a capsule humanoid avatar, orbit camera, day/night cycle, and interactive skill crystals.

highlights: Building and maintaining fullstack web applications across multiple client projects
Handling both frontend (React, Vue) and backend (PHP, Express) responsibilities
Containerized deployments with Docker
Developing a transfer booking platform with Stripe payment integration
Interactive Leaflet maps for route visualization
Containerized deployment with Docker
Developed enterprise-grade web applications using Laravel + Vue stack
End-to-end testing with Playwright
Containerized environments with Laravel Sail
Built a React-based CRM with AI chatbot powered by LLama2
Developed booking web apps and REST APIs
Built template component answer systems
Full-stack development and IT support for real estate platform
SEO optimization and analytics setup
CRM management and WordPress/Laravel development
Developed React and Node.js applications with Material UI
Moodle e-learning integrations
Java-based tool development
Taught Python, Scratch, and MIT App Inventor to children aged 6-18
Developed lesson plans and learning materials for coding courses
Mentored students through project-based learning modules

education.description: Graduated with a focus on software engineering, distributed systems, and game development. Thesis on speech recognition using neural networks.
Expert level certification covering Office Suite, Operating Systems, and PC Hardware fundamentals.
